event.label: 2003 Iraq invasion
event.description: US-led coalition invasion citing alleged WMDs

authority_nodes.title: UN Charter Article 2(4)
authority_nodes.content: All members shall refrain from the threat or use of force

authority_nodes.title: UN Charter Article 51
authority_nodes.content: Nothing impairs inherent right of self-defense until Security Council acts

authority_nodes.title: UN Charter Chapter VII
authority_nodes.content: Council may take action to maintain or restore international peace and security
